'''Aram Acheron''' was a mythical god-king revered by the [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] people, who believed that he would one day burst forth from [[Champala/Legends|Champala's]] sacred [[Logue Rock]] and lead loyal Chagrians to victory over their foes.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Deity-stub}}
